jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at NSE
jsonLd.description:
We at NSE are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!
